title: aspidium longicrure
intro: Aspidium longicrure, also known as the Long-tailed Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Aspidium longicrure include reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. In herbal preparations, Aspidium longicrure is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, or topical creams that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
